steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to specify how long Mozambique officially used the escudo. That requires stating both when the escudo became official (1914) and when it was replaced (1980).

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘Countries sometimes adopt new currency systems, as Mozambique did…’: makes a general point about currency adoption; gives no dates for the escudo’s duration. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Though Mozambique currently uses the metical… introduced in 1914.’: gives only the start date; never says when the escudo ended. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘The escudo was Mozambique’s official currency from 1914 to 1980.’: states both dates and directly specifies the complete duration. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘The metical has been Mozambique’s official currency since 1980…’: focuses on the metical, not the escudo, and omits the escudo’s start date. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
